book.title: Introduction to Retrieval-Augmented Generation
book.author: Alice Johnson
book.description: A comprehensive guide to building RAG systems with modern vector databases and language models.

book.title: Vector Databases in Practice
book.author: Bob Smith
book.description: Practical techniques for deploying and optimizing vector stores for semantic search applications.

book.title: Semantic Search Fundamentals
book.author: Carol White
book.description: Core concepts of dense retrieval, embedding models, and approximate nearest neighbor search.
